title: Simply Trailers: Vanilified
description: A recreation of Minecraft's Update/Drop trailers, fully client-sided.
body:
![Simply Trailers Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aa80403575f4411bce373035d9f70700a4ee3f4.png)
__________________________________________________________________________________________
![Simply Trailers Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bef1aff06e415a3d55584d8a7f11fc26b82e5fa.png)
**The goal of this modpack is simple, make minecraft look like the Update Trailers while being fully client sided.**
__________________________________________________________________________________________
![Simply Trailers Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87a17cde42edbbcc600a16d6135d32397fa047cc.png)
**Maybe.**
__________________________________________________________________________________________
![Simply Trailers Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb3177409d9febbf76d3386cfde7599a23dd9328.png)
**Definetly not! however running it with the packs shaders drops your FPS.**
__________________________________________________________________________________________
![Simply Trailers Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ca32fa64278e5006904f08583952c28a1258953.png)
**Simply Trailers: Vanilified will receive bug fixing updates and visual updates.**
__________________________________________________________________________________________
![Simply Trailers Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99baa64e4043aa1cd5d00dfb3a2b2d943100bffd.png)
**Its called "Vanilified" because this is a diferent version of a upcoming pack "Simply Trailers" this pack will be focused around having client and server side mods, meaning other people will have to download the pack to play with you.**
__________________________________________________________________________________________
Made by nexsusNexo
